sentence: O cielo no ye claro hue.
ipa: ˈo ˈθjelo ˈno ˈʝe ˈklaɾo ˈwe
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Central High-Aragonese distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] and Ĕ>ie 'cielo' per badia1950; copula 'ye' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Estos zapatos cuestan cuaranta euros.
ipa: ˈestos θaˈpatos kweˈstan kwaˈɾanta ˈewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: ⟨z⟩ [θ] distinción and Ŏ>ue 'cuestan' per badia1950; ⟨s⟩+voiced onset sandhi per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Bel·la capan·na ye alta en a pen·na.
ipa: ˈbelːa kaˈpanːa ˈʝe ˈalta ˈen ˈa ˈpenːa
gloss_en: Some hut is high on the crag.
notes: Preserved Latin geminates -LL-/-NN- as long consonants ⟨l·l⟩ [lː] 'bel·la','payel·la'-type and ⟨n·n⟩ [nː] 'capan·na','pen·na' — the diagnostic Bielsa feature per badia1950; distinción per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: A pen·na d'a montaña ye grisa.
ipa: ˈa ˈpenːa ˈð ˈa moˈntaɲa ˈʝe ˈɡɾisa
gloss_en: The crag of the mountain is grey.
notes: Geminate ⟨n·n⟩ [nː] 'pen·na' (< PINNA) per badia1950; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'montaña' per nagore_lain2001; clitic ⟨d'⟩ per badia1950.

sentence: Ves de frente y tuerce en a primera carrera.
ipa: ˈbes ˈde ˈfɾente ˈʝ ˈtweɾθe ˈen ˈa pɾiˈmeɾa kaˈreɾa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn at the first street.
notes: F- retained 'frente' and Ŏ>ue with distinción 'tuerce' per badia1950; 'carrera' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: A nuet yera fosca y feba fret.
ipa: ˈa ˈnwet ˈʝeɾa ˈfoska ˈʝ ˈfeβa ˈfɾet
gloss_en: The night was dark and it was cold.
notes: NOCTE > 'nuet' (-CT- > -t-, the Belsetán reduction, contra general Aragonese 'nueit') per badia1950; imperfect 'yera','feba' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Án ye a clau d'a casa?
ipa: ˈan ˈʝe ˈa ˈklaw ˈð ˈa ˈkasa
gloss_en: Where is the house key?
notes: Interrogative 'án' and 'clau' (key) per badia1950; clitic ⟨d'⟩ before vowel per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Cuántas presonas bienen a cenar?
ipa: ˈkuantas pɾeˈsonas bjeˈnen ˈa θeˈnaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Ĕ>ie 'bienen' and distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cenar' per badia1950; count question per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Si yo podese, mercarba aquella casa.
ipa: ˈsi ˈʝo poˈðese meˈɾkaɾba aˈkeʎa ˈkasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Aragonese conditional -arba 'mercarba' per badia1950; 'mercar' (to buy) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Ahiere merqué cinco quilos de cereixas.
ipa: aˈjeɾe meˈɾke ˈθinko ˈkilos ˈde θeˈɾejʃas
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries.
notes: Distinción ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cinco' and ⟨ix⟩ [ʃ] 'cereixas' per badia1950; preterite 'merqué' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: O feto yera muto pesau ta yo.
ipa: ˈo ˈfeto ˈʝeɾa ˈmuto ˈpesaw ˈta ˈʝo
gloss_en: The deed was too heavy for me.
notes: -CT- > -t- 'feto' (< FACTU) and -ULT- > -t- 'muto' (< MULTU) — Belsetán consonant-cluster reduction per badia1950; participle 'pesau' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Truca-me cuando plegues ta casa.
ipa: ˈtɾuka ˈme ˈkwando ˈpleɡes ˈta ˈkasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: 'trucar','plegar' [ˈpleɡes] per badia1950; ⟨gu⟩ [ɡ] before front vowel per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Buenos diyas, cómo te ba?
ipa: ˈbwenos diˈʝas ˈkomo ˈte ˈba
gloss_en: Good morning, how are you?
notes: Ŏ>ue 'buenos' and 'diya' (day) per badia1950; greeting register per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Más bale paxaro en man que ciento bolando.
ipa: ˈmas ˈbale paˈʃaɾo ˈen ˈman ˈke ˈθjento boˈlando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'paxaro' and distinción ⟨ci⟩ [θ] Ĕ>ie 'ciento' per badia1950; proverb per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: A muller biella pilla l'agulla amariella.
ipa: ˈa muˈʎeɾ ˈbjeʎa ˈpiʎa ˈl ˈaɡʎa amaˈɾjeʎa
gloss_en: The old woman picks up the yellow needle.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] preserved (distinct from the geminate ⟨l·l⟩) 'muller','biella','pilla','agulla' and Ĕ>ie per badia1950; clitic ⟨l'⟩ per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: O can corre por a ribera d'o río.
ipa: ˈo ˈkan ˈkore ˈpoɾ ˈa riˈβeɾa ˈð ˈo ˈrio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'corre', word-initial [r] 'río' vs tap [ɾ] 'ribera' per badia1950; 'can' (dog) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Feito y güeit fan una ueitena.
ipa: ˈfejto ˈʝ ˈɡweit ˈfan ˈuna weiˈtena
gloss_en: Done, and eight make a set of eight.
notes: General -CT- > -it- survives in 'feito','güeit' alongside the reduced 'feto'/'muto' set per badia1950; numeral 'güeit' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: A finestra d'a capan·na ye ubierta.
ipa: ˈa fiˈnestɾa ˈð ˈa kaˈpanːa ˈʝe uˈβjeɾta
gloss_en: The window of the hut is open.
notes: Geminate ⟨n·n⟩ [nː] 'capan·na' and Ŏ>ie 'ubierta' per badia1950; 'finestra' (window) and clitic ⟨d'⟩ per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Plebe muito sobre os campos berdes.
ipa: ˈpleβe ˈmwito ˈsobɾe ˈos ˈkampos ˈbeɾdes
gloss_en: It rains a lot over the green fields.
notes: 'plebe' (rains), 'muito' (< MULTU) per badia1950; plural article 'os' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: No creigo que nieve sobre aquel tozal.
ipa: ˈno ˈkɾejɣo ˈke ˈnjeβe ˈsobɾe aˈkel toˈθal
gloss_en: I do not think it will snow over that hill.
notes: Ĕ>ie 'nieve' and 'creigo','tozal' (hill) per badia1950; negation frame per nagore_lain2001.
